jobs.descriptionSnippet: Our team ensures the interconnection between BRP's systems and those of the dealerships in its network. This connectivity strategy is a key driver of several growth programs at BRP and generates essential information for strategic analysis. As a data analyst, you ensure the reliability, consistency, and quality of the data exchanged.
